Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface ClassVerifier<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the class
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<ClassVerifier<T>,​Class<T>>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClassVerifierImpl, ClassVerifierNoOp
public interface ClassVerifier<T>
extends ExtensibleObjectVerifier<ClassVerifier<T>,​Class<T>>
Verifies the requirements of a Class value.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectVerifier) imply ExtensibleObjectVerifier.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    ClassVerifier<T> isSubtypeOf​(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is a subclass or sub-interface of a type.
    ClassVerifier<T> isSupertypeOf​(Class<?> type)
    Ensures that the actual value is a superclass or super-interface of a type.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isSupertypeOf

      ClassVerifier<T> isSupertypeOf​(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the actual value is a superclass or super-interface of a type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not a supertype of type

    • isSubtypeOf

      ClassVerifier<T> isSubtypeOf​(Class<?> type)
      Ensures that the actual value is a subclass or sub-interface of a type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to compare to
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if type is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not a subtype of type
